name: standards-refresh.sh sitemap crawl fetches the sitemap's loc URLs as leaves and never extracts rules from the index itself
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r40-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs $OUT/out && printf '

A

Sitemap leaf rule alpha

The first mapped page carries one distinct guidance statement.

c' > $OUT/docs/a.html && printf '

B

Sitemap leaf rule beta

The second mapped page carries one distinct guidance statement.

' > $OUT/docs/b.html && printf '

C

Unmapped page rule

This page is linked from a leaf but not mapped and must not contribute.

' > $OUT/docs/c.html && printf 'file://%s/docs/a.htmlfile://%s/docs/b.html' "$OUT" "$OUT" > $OUT/docs/sitemap.xml && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/node/r40-src.yaml; M=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r40-src-*.jsonl | head -1); grep -q 'pages_fetched=2' e.err && grep -q '"status": "index"' "$M" && grep -q 'sitemap-leaf-rule-alpha' $T && grep -q 'sitemap-leaf-rule-beta' $T && ! grep -q 'unmapped-page-rule' $T && echo sitemap-fetches-mapped-leaves-only 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
